chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-90 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No.366/2022. 2. For hearing of main case 01.06.2022 Ms. Asma Hamid, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser, (Customs). -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Matter has been heard at length and with the consent of the parties, we pass the following order. i. That the representation filed by the petitioner would be taken and decided in accordance with law by the Member of IRIS within three weeks’ time after giving ample opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. ii. That in the interim period if the petitioner imports any consignment the same would be provisionally released on the duties and taxes as declared by the petitioner. However, the department may secure a surety in the form of bank guarantee from the petitioner with regard to the disputed duty and taxes, if any. With these directions the instant petition alongwith the listed and pending application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
